---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Kelompok_5_ADW_RC"
date: "2026-05-12"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(readxl); library(forecast); library(tseries)
library(ggplot2); library(dplyr)


# ---- DATA ----
df <- read_excel("C:/Users/Vita Anggraini/Downloads/Data Tanaman Padi Sumatera 1993-2025.xlsx",
                 sheet = "Data Tanaman Padi Sumatera")

provinsi_list <- unique(df$Provinsi)
VAR           <- "Produksi"   # ganti ke "Luas Panen" jika perlu


```


```{r}
# ---- FUNGSI UTAMA ----
run_arima <- function(prov) {
 
  cat("\n============================\n", prov, "\n============================\n")
 
  d_prov <- df %>% filter(Provinsi == prov) %>% arrange(Tahun)
  ts_raw <- ts(d_prov[[VAR]], start = min(d_prov$Tahun), frequency = 1)
 
 
  # -- Bersihkan Outlier dengan tsclean --
  ts_clean <- tsclean(ts_raw, replace.missing = TRUE)
  n_outlier <- sum(round(ts_raw, 0) != round(ts_clean, 0))
  cat("Outlier yang dibersihkan:", n_outlier, "titik\n")
 
 
  # -- Box-Cox: cari lambda optimal (stabilkan varians) --
  lambda <- BoxCox.lambda(ts_clean)
  cat("Lambda Box-Cox:", round(lambda, 4), "\n")
  ts_bc <- BoxCox(ts_clean, lambda)
 
 
  # -- Uji Stasioneritas Awal --
  cat("\n[Stasioneritas - Sebelum Differencing]\n")
  adf1  <- adf.test(ts_bc)$p.value
  kpss1 <- suppressWarnings(kpss.test(ts_bc)$p.value)
  cat("ADF  p-value:", round(adf1,  4), ifelse(adf1  < 0.05, "-> Stasioner", "-> Tidak Stasioner"), "\n")
  cat("KPSS p-value:", round(kpss1, 4), ifelse(kpss1 > 0.05, "-> Stasioner", "-> Tidak Stasioner"), "\n")
 
 
  # -- Differencing Iteratif sampai Stasioner --
  ts_work <- ts_bc
  d_order <- 0
  repeat {
    ap <- adf.test(ts_work)$p.value
    kp <- suppressWarnings(kpss.test(ts_work)$p.value)
    if ((ap < 0.05 && kp > 0.05) || d_order >= 2) break
    ts_work <- diff(ts_work)
    d_order <- d_order + 1
  }
  cat("Orde differencing (d):", d_order, "\n")
 
  if (d_order > 0) {
    cat("\n[Stasioneritas - Setelah Differencing ke-", d_order, "]\n")
    cat("ADF  p-value:", round(adf.test(ts_work)$p.value, 4), "\n")
    cat("KPSS p-value:", round(suppressWarnings(kpss.test(ts_work)$p.value), 4), "\n")
  }
 
 
  # -- Plot ACF & PACF --
  par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
  acf(ts_work,  main = paste("ACF -", prov))
  pacf(ts_work, main = paste("PACF -", prov))
  par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
 
 
  # -- Fit Model ARIMA (lambda dimasukkan agar forecast balik ke skala asli) --
  model <- auto.arima(ts_clean, d = d_order, lambda = lambda,
                      stepwise = FALSE, approximation = FALSE,
                      ic = "aic", trace = FALSE)
  cat("\n[Model Terpilih]\n")
  print(summary(model))
 
 
  # -- Diagnostik Residual --
  resid <- residuals(model)
  lb    <- Box.test(resid, lag = 10, type = "Ljung-Box")
  sw    <- shapiro.test(resid)
  cat("\nLjung-Box    p-value:", round(lb$p.value, 4),
      ifelse(lb$p.value > 0.05, "-> Residual OK", "-> Ada autokorelasi"), "\n")
  cat("Shapiro-Wilk p-value:", round(sw$p.value, 4),
      ifelse(sw$p.value > 0.05, "-> Normal", "-> Tidak Normal"), "\n")
  checkresiduals(model)
 
 
  # -- Forecast 2026-2030 (otomatis balik ke skala asli via lambda) --
  fc    <- forecast(model, h = 5, level = c(80, 95))
  fc_df <- data.frame(
    Tahun    = 2026:2030,
    Forecast = round(as.numeric(fc$mean),         0),
    Lo_80    = round(as.numeric(fc$lower[, 1]),   0),
    Hi_80    = round(as.numeric(fc$upper[, 1]),   0),
    Lo_95    = round(as.numeric(fc$lower[, 2]),   0),
    Hi_95    = round(as.numeric(fc$upper[, 2]),   0)
  )
  cat("\n[Forecast 2026-2030 -", prov, "]\n")
  print(fc_df)
 
 
  # -- Plot Forecast --
  p <- autoplot(fc) +
    labs(title    = paste0("Forecast ARIMA(",
                           paste(arimaorder(model), collapse = ","),
                           ") - ", prov),
         subtitle = paste("Variabel:", VAR, "| BoxCox lambda =", round(lambda, 3)),
         x = "Tahun", y = VAR) +
    theme_minimal()
  print(p)
 
 
  return(list(provinsi = prov,
              order    = arimaorder(model),
              lambda   = round(lambda, 4),
              AIC      = round(AIC(model), 2),
              RMSE     = round(accuracy(model)[, "RMSE"], 2),
              MAPE     = round(accuracy(model)[, "MAPE"], 4),
              LB_p     = round(lb$p.value, 4),
              SW_p     = round(sw$p.value, 4),
              forecast = fc_df))
}
 
 
# ---- JALANKAN SEMUA PROVINSI ----
hasil <- lapply(unique(df$Provinsi), run_arima)
names(hasil) <- unique(df$Provinsi)
 
 
# ---- RINGKASAN ----
cat("\n\n==============================\n")
cat("  RINGKASAN SEMUA PROVINSI\n")
cat("==============================\n")
 
ringkasan <- do.call(rbind, lapply(hasil, function(x) {
  data.frame(Provinsi = x$provinsi,
             p = x$order[1], d = x$order[2], q = x$order[3],
             Lambda = x$lambda,
             AIC  = x$AIC, RMSE = x$RMSE, MAPE = x$MAPE,
             LB_p = x$LB_p, SW_p = x$SW_p)
}))
print(ringkasan)
```
